title: Alan Gardiner
body: Sir Alan Henderson Gardiner,  (29 March 1879 – 19 December 1963) was an English Egyptologist, linguist, philologist, and independent scholar. He is regarded as one of the premier Egyptologists of the early and mid-20th century.
categories: Alumni of the Queen's College, Oxford
